display.purpose: Single H1 in the header only.

motion.name: ease-card-state
motion.purpose: Background, transform, and border transitions on interactive cards.

breakpoints.name: card-grid-min
breakpoints.purpose: minmax column width for auto-fit project grid.

components.name: Hub project card
components.description: Full-width grid cell link; badge, title, description stack.
components.html: LiveSet List GeneratorBuild, organise and share gig set lists.
components.css: .ds-card { box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; background: #181d24; color: #e7ecf2; border: 1px solid #232a34; border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px 22px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 120ms ease, transform 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { background: #1f2630; border-color: #2c3543; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #38bdf8; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-card__title { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-card__desc { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; color: #9aa6b2; }

components.name: Status badge default
components.css: .ds-badge { box-sizing: border-box; align-self: flex-start; display: inline-block; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid; } .ds-badge--default { background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.12); color: #f59e0b; border-color: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.35); }

components.name: Status badge live
components.css: .ds-badge { box-sizing: border-box; align-self: flex-start; display: inline-block; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid; } .ds-badge--live { background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.12); color: #38bdf8; border-color: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.35); }

components.name: Status badge external
components.css: .ds-badge { box-sizing: border-box; align-self: flex-start; display: inline-block; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid; } .ds-badge--external { background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.12); color: #cbd5e1; border-color: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.35); }

narrative.overview:
This system implements the strategic line from PRODUCT.md: the interface should feel like a workshop with the lights on—ordered, intentional, and slightly warm inside a cool graphite shell. Density is calm and scannable: one hero message, then grids of equal-weight cards so projects read as inventory you maintain, not as marketing fiction.

The visual story is ember-and-console: a restrained amber accent pairs with a cool sky accent reserved for live state. Neutrals carry almost all surface area; color earns its keep on badges and the mark, not in full-bleed gradients.

The system explicitly rejects the vibe of Generic “AI SaaS” marketing pages, Portfolio theatre, and Loud personal-brand energy—as named in PRODUCT.md.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first canvas with a single soft radial lift (ambient only).
System sans stack end-to-end; hierarchy from scale and weight.
Cards as the primary interactive surface pattern.
Motion is state-only: short ease on hover/disabled.
Static-file discipline: tokens in :root in index.html.

rules.name: The Two-Accent Orchestra Rule
rules.body: Amber and sky never compete at the same hierarchy level on one component: one badge, one role.

rules.name: The No-Wash Rule
rules.body: Do not replace the canvas with saturated amber or sky fills. Large fields stay neutral; accents stay small.

rules.name: The Measure Rule
rules.body: Marketing explanation in the header caps near 65ch effective width; card copy should avoid long unbroken lines.

rules.name: The Hover-Is-State Rule
rules.body: Motion and tonal change appear together on :hover for enabled cards; disabled cards must not lift or brighten on hover.

dos: Do keep ≥ rough AA contrast for text-muted on canvas-base when you add new copy blocks.
Do preserve the card-first scan path: grids stay repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)) with 20px gap unless a breakpoint audit says otherwise.
Do add an explicit :focus-visible outline on .card links before expanding keyboard paths.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion if hover translation or transitions grow beyond the current subtle move.
donts: Don't build layouts that read as Generic “AI SaaS” marketing pages—no purple gradients, glassmorphism stacks, interchangeable hero metrics, or fake urgency (PRODUCT.md anti-references, quoted).
Don't ship Portfolio theatre: no endless identical case-study cards with buzzwords and no working links.
Don't chase Loud personal-brand energy: no meme-density layouts, chaos grids, or novelty effects that compete with project links.
Don't use side-stripe accent borders (>1px colored border-left / border-right on cards or lists) as a decorative pattern.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradients) for headings or titles.
Don't add modal-first flows on this hub; keep navigation flat and direct.
